<recommended_plugins>
Here is a list of plugins that are available but not installed. If the user's query would benefit from one of these plugins, use the `request_plugin_install` tool to suggest that they install it. Pass the parenthesized ID as `plugin_id`. For example, suggest the Google Drive plugin if the query could possibly be better answered with access to Google Drive.

- Atlassian Rovo (atlassian-rovo@openai-curated-remote)
- Box (box@openai-curated-remote)
- Figma (figma@openai-curated-remote)
- Gmail (gmail@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Calendar (google-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Drive (google-drive@openai-curated-remote)
- Notion (notion@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Calendar (outlook-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Email (outlook-email@openai-curated-remote)
- SharePoint (sharepoint@openai-curated-remote)
- Slack (slack@openai-curated-remote)
- Teams (teams@openai-curated-remote)
</recommended_plugins>

Thoroughly review the Google oidc implementation on this branch, comparing it to the other existing similar implementations here, along with the relevant Google documentation and authoritative guidance
I’m applying the code-review skill’s Spec axis, then I’ll verify the branch behavior against Google’s primary OIDC and IAM Credentials documentation and analogous GitHub/Fly implementations.

input.input: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' /Users/cysp/.agents/skills/code-review/SKILL.md && git status --short --branch && git diff --stat origin/main...HEAD && git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git log --oneline origin/main..HEAD && git diff origin/main...HEAD -- packages/oidc-issuer-google-service-account workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/authentication.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/oidc-issuers.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/google-service-account-token-policy-rule.ts SECURITY.md docs/service-contract.md docs/implementation.md README.md test/google-service-account-token-policy-rule.test.ts test/authentication.test.ts test/oidc-issuers.test.ts && nl -ba packages/oidc-issuer-google-service-account/src/issuer.ts && nl -ba workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/google-service-account-token-policy-rule.ts && nl -ba workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/authentication.ts && nl -ba workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/oidc-issuers.ts","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.web__run({find:[{ref_id:"turn1view0","pattern":"includeEmail"},{ref_id:"turn1view0","pattern":"audience"},{ref_id:"turn1view1","pattern":"azp"},{ref_id:"turn1view1","pattern":"iss"},{ref_id:"turn1view2","pattern":"service account ID token"},{ref_id:"turn1view2","pattern":"audience"}],response_length:"long"}); text(r);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"nl -ba packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/src/issuer.ts; nl -ba packages/oidc-issuer-fly/src/issuer.ts; nl -ba packages/oidc-issuer-google-service-account/test/issuer.test.ts; nl -ba docs/service-contract.md | sed -n '35,110p'; nl -ba docs/implementation.md | sed -n '70,105p'; nl -ba SECURITY.md | sed -n '7,25p'; nl -ba test/google-service-account-token-policy-rule.test.ts","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":25000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Google|google|generateIdToken|service-account|service account\" README.md SECURITY.md docs CONTEXT.md packages workers test | head -200; git show --stat --oneline 899391c; git show -s --format=fuller 899391c","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.web__run({search_query:[{"q":"site:cloud.google.com compute metadata identity token azp sub service account full format"},{"q":"site:docs.cloud.google.com \"azp\" \"service account\" \"ID token\" metadata"}],"response_length":"long"}); text(r);

content.text:
1. **P2 — Compatible-token acquisition is undocumented.** [README.md](/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot/README.md:37) requires `aud=cyspbot`, and [README.md](/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot/README.md:85) allows email-constrained rules, but callers are never told to request a service-account token with `audience: "cyspbot"` and `includeEmail: true` when needed. Google says `audience` is required and only `includeEmail=true` adds `email` and `email_verified`. See [IAM Credentials API](https://docs.cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/credentials/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/generateIdToken) and [Get an ID token](https://docs.cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/get-id-token).

2. **P3 — Service-contract requirements contradict Google support.** [docs/service-contract.md](/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot/docs/service-contract.md:81) says each issuance requires the following conditions, but lines 83–90 require GitHub Actions and GitHub-only claims (`event_name`, `ref_type`, `repository`, `ref`, `workflow_ref`). Google tokens cannot satisfy these, while line 94 says they are supported. Those bullets should be explicitly GitHub-specific.

No implemented-but-wrong Google runtime behavior or Google-specific scope creep found. [issuer.ts](/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot/packages/oidc-issuer-google-service-account/src/issuer.ts:4) matches Google’s current [service-account ID-token contract](https://docs.cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/token-types#service_account_id_tokens): RS256/global Google JWKS, exact HTTPS issuer, requester-chosen audience, and service-account unique ID in matching `azp`/`sub`. Audience is checked centrally in [authentication.ts](/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot/workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/authentication.ts:85), and email policy correctly requires `email_verified=true`.
